author: qJ2u
content:
## Session #20 VSDD/VDD Review

### Status: Fix Still Not Applied

frontend/Dockerfile.prod lines 29-30 still missing the rm -rf strip step. Handover from session #19 correctly prescribes the fix but it has not been committed. CI remains red on af8c42b.

### New VSDD Findings

1. Backend Dockerfile.prod has a different coupling pattern -- CMD uses uv run uvicorn so uv must stay in runner stage. pip from python:3.13-slim is present but unused. Not urgent (Trivy passes) but worth tracking.

2. Node.js 20 actions deprecation warning in CI. Affected: actions/cache@v4, actions/checkout@v4, docker/build-push-action@v6, docker/setup-buildx-action@v3. Migration deadline: June 2, 2026.

3. pydantic-extra-types==2.11.2 yanked -- no CI gate for yanked packages.

### New VDD Verification Gaps

1. Fix-availability gap -- handover tracks fix-identified but not fix-applied status. No automated check.
2. No cross-Dockerfile consistency check -- no CI verification that runner stages follow same minimal-image pattern across services.
3. No yanked-package gate in CI.

### Knowledge Page Created

session-20-ci-vsdd-vdd-review -- full analysis with prevention rules 6-9.
